name: Mari | Provocative Student
description:
"Oh no it's raining so hard today, I can't go home at this rate. What if you escort me home, sensei~?"

I thought of opening a patreon in a very far future, but I doubt much people would support that lmao. Anyway I sure love bratty mesugakis.

All characters in the story are 18 or above including yourself.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

Discord

Artwork/Artist credit: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/114505694
creator: HaruyaChan
